UK Tax Services

Year-End Accounts & Corporation Tax

Comprehensive year-end accounts preparation and corporation tax filing with strategic tax planning. Our tax specialists ensure compliance while maximizing legitimate tax savings for your business.

Get a QuoteBook Consultation

Strategic Tax Planning & Compliance

Corporation tax is one of the most significant costs for UK businesses. Our team of tax specialists combines technical expertise with commercial awareness to ensure you pay only what's legally required while taking full advantage of available reliefs and allowances.

We prepare statutory accounts in full compliance with UK IFRS and Companies House requirements, while simultaneously optimizing your corporation tax position through careful planning and legitimate tax efficiency strategies.

£2M+
Tax Savings Secured
100%
Filing Compliance

Current Corporation Tax Rates

Profits up to £50,00019%
Profits £50,000 - £250,00026.5% (marginal relief)
Profits over £250,00025%

*Rates as of April 2025 for 2025/26 tax year. Subject to change.

Comprehensive Services

Our Services

Statutory Accounts

Preparation of full statutory accounts in compliance with UK IFRS and Companies House filing requirements, including balance sheet, profit and loss, and notes.

  • UK IFRS compliance
  • Companies House filing
  • Director reports
  • Audit-ready accounts

Corporation Tax Computation

Detailed corporation tax calculations including all adjustments, reliefs, and allowances, with full tax computations and CT600 form preparation.

  • CT600 preparation
  • Tax adjustments
  • Relief calculations
  • Allowance optimization

Tax Planning

Proactive tax planning throughout the year to optimize your position and minimize tax liabilities through legitimate tax efficiency strategies.

  • Year-round planning
  • Timing optimization
  • Structure review
  • Profit extraction

R&D Tax Credits

Identification and claiming of R&D tax credits for innovative businesses with qualifying activities, including technical documentation and claim preparation.

  • Eligibility assessment
  • Claim preparation
  • Technical documentation
  • HMRC correspondence

Loss Relief Planning

Strategic use of trading losses against current or future profits to maximize tax efficiency, including carry-forward and carry-back relief optimization.

  • Loss utilization
  • Carry-forward relief
  • Carry-back relief
  • Surrender relief

Director Tax Planning

Optimization of director remuneration through salary, dividends, and pension contributions to minimize overall tax burden while maintaining compliance.

  • Salary vs dividends
  • Pension planning
  • Benefits optimization
  • NI planning

Tax Optimization

Tax Reliefs & Allowances We Utilize

Annual Investment Allowance (AIA)

100% tax relief on qualifying plant and machinery expenditure up to £1 million per year. Ideal for businesses investing in equipment, vehicles, and technology.

Benefit: Immediate tax deduction

R&D Tax Credits

Enhanced tax relief for qualifying research and development expenditure. Up to 33.35% creditable for SMEs. We identify eligible activities and prepare technical documentation.

Benefit: Up to 33.35% creditable

Writing Down Allowances

Capital allowances on assets not qualifying for AIA, including integral features and special rate assets. We optimize your capital allowance claims for maximum tax efficiency.

Benefit: 18% or 6% WDA rates

Patent Box

Reduced 10% corporation tax rate on profits derived from patented inventions and certain IP rights. We help qualifying companies structure their IP for Patent Box benefits.

Benefit: 10% tax rate

Creative Industry Tax Reliefs

Enhanced reliefs for film, television, animation, and video game production companies. We ensure you claim all available creative industry reliefs.

Benefit: Enhanced deductions

Loss Relief

Carry forward trading losses indefinitely, or carry back one year against current year profits. We strategically plan loss utilization to maximize tax efficiency.

Benefit: Indefinite carry forward

Our Process

Year-End Timeline

01

Data Collection

We request all necessary financial documents and records including bank statements, invoices, and payroll data.

02

Accounts Preparation

Draft accounts prepared and reviewed with management to ensure accuracy and completeness of financial statements.

03

Tax Computation

Corporation tax calculation with all reliefs applied, including detailed CT600 form preparation and review.

04

Filing & Payment

Accounts filed with Companies House, CT600 filed with HMRC. We handle all correspondence and queries.

Important Deadlines: Corporation tax returns are due 12 months after your accounting period end. Payment is due 9 months after your accounting period end. We track all deadlines and ensure timely compliance to avoid penalties.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the current corporation tax rate?

The main rate is 25% for profits over £250,000. A small profits rate of 19% applies to profits up to £50,000. Marginal relief applies between £50,000 and £250,000 to smooth the transition between rates.

When is corporation tax due?

Corporation tax payment is due 9 months and 1 day after your accounting period end. The tax return (CT600) is due 12 months after your accounting period end. We track all deadlines and ensure timely filing and payment.

Can I reduce my corporation tax liability?

Yes, through legitimate tax planning including capital allowances, R&D tax credits, loss relief, and director remuneration optimization. We ensure all strategies are fully compliant with HMRC regulations and tailored to your specific circumstances.

What records do I need to keep?

You must keep records for at least 6 years including invoices, receipts, bank statements, payroll records, and documentation for all tax relief claims. We help you establish proper record-keeping systems to ensure compliance.

Do I need an audit?

Not all companies require an audit. Small companies meeting certain criteria are exempt. We assess your audit requirements and work with auditors if needed, ensuring your accounts are audit-ready at all times.

How can you help with tax planning?

We provide year-round tax planning including timing of expenditures, capital allowance optimization, director remuneration planning, and profit extraction strategies. Our proactive approach ensures you minimize tax liabilities while maintaining full compliance.
